title: ScrollArea Component
content:
## ScrollArea Component The `ScrollArea` component provides a customizable scrollable container using `@radix-ui/react-scroll-area`. ### Purpose This component is designed to encapsulate the functionality of a scrollable area, allowing for custom styling and integration within the UI. It separates the core scrollable viewport from the scrollbars and corners, enabling independent control and styling. ### Key Exports * **`ScrollArea`**: The main component that wraps the scrollable content. It accepts standard `React.ComponentProps`. * `className`: Custom CSS classes to apply to the root element. * `children`: The content to be displayed within the scrollable area. * **`ScrollBar`**: A component specifically for rendering the scrollbar. It accepts `React.ComponentProps`. * `className`: Custom CSS classes to apply to the scrollbar element. * `orientation`: Can be `'vertical'` (default) or `'horizontal'`. Defines the orientation of the scrollbar. ### Usage Example ```tsx import { ScrollArea } from "@/components/ui/scroll-area"; function MyComponent() { return (
{/* Long content that will cause scrolling */}

This is some content inside the scroll area.

...

More content...
); } ```
